title: Amazon Says AWS' Bahrain Region 'Disrupted' By Drone Activity Amid Iran War
summary_full: Amazon Web Services (AWS) in Bahrain has been affected by drone activity amid the ongoing US-Iran war.
summary_public: Amazon Web Services (AWS) in Bahrain has been affected by drone activity amid the ongoing US-Iran war.
